name: verified-algebra-workflow
old_string:
## Combined with the grounding audit
This DB-mining is step 0 of the forwarded-claim grounding audit
(`ai-claim-list-grounding-audit.md`): after `search_files`/`terminal` confirm a
cited file is missing or is the wrong experiment, mine `state-*.db` to learn
whether the generator ever existed and which session produced it. Then report the
reproducibility gap honestly: documented (gate-ledger `.md` + DB confirmation) but
NOT re-runnable (script deleted, frame unpublished).
